name: Alpine
short_description: Alpine is a Skiing Arcade Game where your objective is to avoid rocks and other skiers while zooming down a mountain at lightning fast speeds! Collect power ups to help you on your mission to conquer the mountain! Collect coins to purchase new gear from Badger’s shop!
detailed_description:
Alpine is a Skiing Arcade Game where your objective is to avoid rocks and other skiers while zooming down a mountain at lightning fast speeds! Collect power-ups to help you on your mission to conquer the mountain! Collect coins to purchase new gear from Badger’s shop!



ROCKET: Strap a lit rocket to your back and let the force push you down the mountain at such high speeds that any rock in your way gets torn to shreds!

SLEDGE HAMMER: SMASH your way through any and all rocks in your way with this BRUTAL sledge hammer!

BANKER: Let Frank the Bankman take care of your finances and DOUBLE the amount of coins you collect!

MAGNET: Sleeping on the job? No problem! With this power up you don't even have to collect coins, they just fly towards you!

GYMNAST: Thanks to your dedication to NEVER skipping leg day at the gym, you can now JUMP over rocks effortlessly!





  • Use our Centralised High Efficiency Storage Trunk or C H E S T for short to store all of your belongings and switch out power-ups!

  • Purchase new power-ups from Badgers shop!

  • Collect coins!

  • Break golden rocks to get extra coins!

  • Play through 10 challenging levels!
